headline: Charles River Stock Moves North Since Q4 Earnings and Revenue Beat
summary: CRAI's shares rise 3.1% after Q4 earnings and revenues top estimates. The company records double-digit sales growth and expects 2026 revenues of $785-$805M.

headline: Charles River Laboratories to Present at TD Cowen and Barclays Conferences
